items.title: Cops bashed Brad, broke his ribs, then charged him with assault

items.title: Australian housing market stalls in May

children.content: Australia's housing market continues to lose momentum, with national home values flatlining in May as higher interest rates, weak confidence and proposed property tax changes weigh on demand.

items.title: As One Nation broadens its economic appeal, the Liberals return to culture wars
